zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Hainaut於1311年6月24日出生在法國皮卡迪索姆勒 可斯諾易時，她的父親Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande24歲，母親Jeanne de Valois21歲。她於1323年2月25日與Ludwig IV von Bayern在德國海因里希_海普洛文次可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1356年6月23日享年44歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Hainaut于1311年6月24日出生在法国皮卡迪索姆勒 可斯諾易时，她的父亲Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande24岁，母亲Jeanne de Valois21岁。她于1323年2月25日与Ludwig IV von Bayern在德国海因里希_海普洛文次可爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1356年6月23日享年44岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Hainaut was born on 24 June 1311, in Le Quesnoy, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, was 24 and her mother, Jeanne de Valois, was 21. She married Ludwig IV von Bayern on 25 February 1323, in Köln, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 23 June 1356, at the age of 44, and was buried in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Hainaut est née le 24 juin 1311, à Le Quesnoy, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Valois, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Ludwig IV von Bayern le 25 février 1323, à Köln, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 juin 1356, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.Puch, Fürstenfeldbruck, Bavaria, Germany: Puch, Fürstenfeldbruck, Landkreis Fürstenfeldbruck, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Hainaut am 24. Juni 1311 in Le Quesnoy, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande 24 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Valois 21. Sie hat am 25. Februar 1323 in Köln, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland Ludwig IV von Bayern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Juni 1356 im Alter von 44 Jahren und wurde in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Hainaut è nata il il 24 giugno 1311 nel Le Quesnoy, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Valois, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Ludwig IV von Bayern il 25 febbraio 1323, nel Köln, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 giugno 1356, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Hainautが1311年6月24日にフランスピカーディソンメル クエスノイで生まれた時，父Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollandeは24歳，母Jeanne de Valoisは21歳であった。1323年2月25日にドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクoルンでLudwig IV von Bayernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1356年6月23日に44歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードベレンシエンスにて埋葬された。

ko.Puch, Fürstenfeldbruck, Bavaria, Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 프u르스펠드브럭 프u르스펠드브럭 푸치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Hainaut(이)가 1311년 6월 24일 프랑스 피카디 솜 일 크스노이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Valois(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1323년 2월 25일 독일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 ko에서 Ludwig IV von Bayern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1356년 6월 23일 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 발시네스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Hainaut nasceu em 24 de junho de 1311, em Le Quesnoy, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Valois, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Ludwig IV von Bayern em 25 de fevereiro de 1323, em Köln, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de junho de 1356, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Hainaut родилась 24 июня 1311 г. в местности л куеснои, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Valois, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ludwig IV von Bayern 25 февраля 1323 г. в местности кoлн, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 23 июня 1356 г. в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Hainaut nació el 24 de junio de 1311, en Le Quesnoy, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Valois, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ludwig IV von Bayern el 25 de febrero de 1323, en Köln, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de junio de 1356, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
